TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == iga-Amilika sasumidang,2001 == ÁĺéŚúčśÉÖÁ∑£ ,2001 "Amilika sasumidang"(Amilika:Serendipity)u 2001 iga,nay John Kusake atu Kayti Pequin ku mapalaw. nasulitan ni Marc Klein. ci Peter Chesom patudu. ci Alan Silvestri misanga dadiw. kamu nu Hulam:" .ťõĽŚĹĪÁĒĪ Marc Klein ťÄ≤Ť°ĆŚäáśú¨ŚČĶšĹú,Peter Chelsom śďĒšĽĽŚįéśľĒ.Alan Silvestri ÁāļťõĽŚĹĪŤÉĆśôĮťü≥ś®āŤ≠úśõ≤. kamu nu Amilka:Serendipity is a 2001 American romantic comedy film directed by Peter Chelsom, written by Marc Klein, and starring John Cusack and Kate Beckinsale. The music score was composed by Alan Silvestri. kakuniza nu iga lacul nu iga yadah ku kawaw, amizateng anu maazih. . uyzasa ku sasumidang, . - (Amilika a kamu ŤčĪśĖáśĎėŤ¶Ā) For many things you have to see it before you believe; but for love, sometimes you have to believe first before you can see it. - i xmas a puu', sisuledaay a labiyi. , maletemuh ci Jonathan atu Sara i New York a zazan. JonathanŤąáSaraŚú®ÁīźÁīĄŤ°óť†≠ŚĀ∂ťĀá. haca izawtu ku mamidang ci Jonathan atu Sara , masasiket tu ku sepi tina tatusaay, miketun palalid haw ku sepi. uyzasa caaytu masasiket. izaw henay ku zateng i balucu' nu heni. , miliyas tu ku heni. , culil tu teked a uzip. ŤĶįŚźĎŚźĄŤá™ÁöĄšļļÁĒü. iga siwkay nu Hulam ci Changnasen izaw tu ku mamidang, ci Sala sa izaw tu ku mamidang. iayaw nu Xmas, malitemuh i New York, nama maala ku malecaday a lima-zikuc. ci Changnasen maydih miliwan ku telay bangku ni Sala. sakamu satu ci Sala, anu izaw ku sepi, maletemuh aca ku heni. yadah ku mihca, asiacawa tu ci Changnasen atu ci Sala. iayaw nu kasiacawa, kaliyuh ku heni. maliyuh tu ku tatengaay a mamidang. sisa, mikilim tu ku heni. izaway cacay ku malimanay a cudad atu tatipeluk nu cakay.
S.PHON: == iga-amir~…ĺika sasumidaŇč,**** == **** ,**** "amir~…ĺika sasumidaŇč"(amir~…ĺika:s…ôr…ôndipitj)u **** iga,naj *ońßn kusak…ô atu kajti p…ô*uin ku mapar~…ĺaw. nasur~…ĺitan ni mar ¶ kr~…ĺ…ôin. ¶i p…ôt…ôr ¶ńß…ôsom patudu. ¶i ar~…ĺan sir~…ĺ*…ôstri misaŇča dadiw. kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:" .*** mar ¶ kr~…ĺ…ôin ******,p…ôt…ôr ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺsom ****.ar~…ĺan sir~…ĺ*…ôstri *********. kamu nu amir~…ĺka:s…ôr…ôndipitj is a **** am…ôri ¶an romanti ¶ ¶om…ôdj fir~…ĺm dir…ô ¶t…ôd bj p…ôt…ôr ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺsom, writt…ôn bj mar ¶ kr~…ĺ…ôin, and starriŇč *ońßn ¶usa ¶k and kat…ô b…ô ¶kinsar~…ĺ…ô. tńß…ô musi ¶ s ¶or…ô was ¶ompos…ôd bj ar~…ĺan sir~…ĺ*…ôstri. kakuniza nu iga r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu iga jadańß ku kawaw, amizat…ôŇč anu maazińß. . ujzasa ku sasumidaŇč, . - (amir~…ĺika a kamu ****) for manj tńßiŇčs jou ńßa*…ô to s…ô…ô it b…ôfor…ô jou b…ôr~…ĺi…ô*…ô; but for r~…ĺo*…ô, som…ôtim…ôs jou ńßa*…ô to b…ôr~…ĺi…ô*…ô first b…ôfor…ô jou ¶an s…ô…ô it. - i *mas a puu Ē~ °, sisur~…ĺ…ôdaaj a r~…ĺabiji. , mar~…ĺ…ôt…ômuńß ¶i *onatńßan atu sara i n…ôw jork a zazan. *onatńßan*sara*******. ńßa ¶a izawtu ku mamidaŇč ¶i *onatńßan atu sara , masasik…ôt tu ku s…ôpi tina tatusaaj, mik…ôtun par~…ĺar~…ĺid ńßaw ku s…ôpi. ujzasa ¶aajtu masasik…ôt. izaw ńß…ônaj ku zat…ôŇč i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni. , mir~…ĺijas tu ku ńß…ôni. , ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu t…ôk…ôd a uzip. *******. iga siwkaj nu ńßur~…ĺam ¶i ¶ńßaŇčnas…ôn izaw tu ku mamidaŇč, ¶i sar~…ĺa sa izaw tu ku mamidaŇč. iajaw nu *mas, mar~…ĺit…ômuńß i n…ôw jork, nama maar~…ĺa ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺima-ziku ¶. ¶i ¶ńßaŇčnas…ôn majdińß mir~…ĺiwan ku t…ôr~…ĺaj baŇčku ni sar~…ĺa. sakamu satu ¶i sar~…ĺa, anu izaw ku s…ôpi, mar~…ĺ…ôt…ômuńß a ¶a ku ńß…ôni. jadańß ku mińß ¶a, asia ¶awa tu ¶i ¶ńßaŇčnas…ôn atu ¶i sar~…ĺa. iajaw nu kasia ¶awa, kar~…ĺijuńß ku ńß…ôni. mar~…ĺijuńß tu ku tat…ôŇčaaj a mamidaŇč. sisa, mikir~…ĺim tu ku ńß…ôni. izawaj ¶a ¶aj ku mar~…ĺimanaj a ¶udad atu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu ¶akaj.
S.FORM: == iga-Amilika sasumidang,2001 == ÁĺéŚúčśÉÖÁ∑£ ,2001 "Amilika sasumidang"(Amilika:Serendipity)u 2001 iga,nay John Kusake atu Kayti Pequin ku mapalaw. nasulitan ni Marc Klein. ci Peter Chesom patudu. ci Alan Silvestri misanga dadiw. kamu nu Hulam:" .ťõĽŚĹĪÁĒĪ Marc Klein ťÄ≤Ť°ĆŚäáśú¨ŚČĶšĹú,Peter Chelsom śďĒšĽĽŚįéśľĒ.Alan Silvestri ÁāļťõĽŚĹĪŤÉĆśôĮťü≥ś®āŤ≠úśõ≤. kamu nu Amilka:Serendipity is a 2001 American romantic comedy film directed by Peter Chelsom, written by Marc Klein, and starring John Cusack and Kate Beckinsale. The music score was composed by Alan Silvestri. kakuniza nu iga lacul nu iga yadah ku kawaw, amizateng anu maazih. . uyzasa ku sasumidang, . - (Amilika a kamu ŤčĪśĖáśĎėŤ¶Ā) For many things you have to see it before you believe; but for love, sometimes you have to believe first before you can see it. - i xmas a puu', sisuledaay a labiyi. , maletemuh ci Jonathan atu Sara i New York a zazan. JonathanŤąáSaraŚú®ÁīźÁīĄŤ°óť†≠ŚĀ∂ťĀá. haca izawtu ku mamidang ci Jonathan atu Sara , masasiket tu ku sepi tina tatusaay, miketun palalid haw ku sepi. uyzasa caaytu masasiket. izaw henay ku zateng i balucu' nu heni. , miliyas tu ku heni. , culil tu teked a uzip. ŤĶįŚźĎŚźĄŤá™ÁöĄšļļÁĒü. iga siwkay nu Hulam ci Changnasen izaw tu ku mamidang, ci Sala sa izaw tu ku mamidang. iayaw nu Xmas, malitemuh i New York, nama maala ku malecaday a lima-zikuc. ci Changnasen maydih miliwan ku telay bangku ni Sala. sakamu satu ci Sala, anu izaw ku sepi, maletemuh aca ku heni. yadah ku mihca, asiacawa tu ci Changnasen atu ci Sala. iayaw nu kasiacawa, kaliyuh ku heni. maliyuh tu ku tatengaay a mamidang. sisa, mikilim tu ku heni. izaway cacay ku malimanay a cudad atu tatipeluk nu cakay.
S.PHON: == iga-amir~…ĺika sasumidaŇč,**** == **** ,**** "amir~…ĺika sasumidaŇč"(amir~…ĺika:s…ôr…ôndipitj)u **** iga,naj *ońßn kusak…ô atu kajti p…ô*uin ku mapar~…ĺaw. nasur~…ĺitan ni mar ¶ kr~…ĺ…ôin. ¶i p…ôt…ôr ¶ńß…ôsom patudu. ¶i ar~…ĺan sir~…ĺ*…ôstri misaŇča dadiw. kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:" .*** mar ¶ kr~…ĺ…ôin ******,p…ôt…ôr ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺsom ****.ar~…ĺan sir~…ĺ*…ôstri *********. kamu nu amir~…ĺka:s…ôr…ôndipitj is a **** am…ôri ¶an romanti ¶ ¶om…ôdj fir~…ĺm dir…ô ¶t…ôd bj p…ôt…ôr ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺsom, writt…ôn bj mar ¶ kr~…ĺ…ôin, and starriŇč *ońßn ¶usa ¶k and kat…ô b…ô ¶kinsar~…ĺ…ô. tńß…ô musi ¶ s ¶or…ô was ¶ompos…ôd bj ar~…ĺan sir~…ĺ*…ôstri. kakuniza nu iga r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu iga jadańß ku kawaw, amizat…ôŇč anu maazińß. . ujzasa ku sasumidaŇč, . - (amir~…ĺika a kamu ****) for manj tńßiŇčs jou ńßa*…ô to s…ô…ô it b…ôfor…ô jou b…ôr~…ĺi…ô*…ô; but for r~…ĺo*…ô, som…ôtim…ôs jou ńßa*…ô to b…ôr~…ĺi…ô*…ô first b…ôfor…ô jou ¶an s…ô…ô it. - i *mas a puu Ē~ °, sisur~…ĺ…ôdaaj a r~…ĺabiji. , mar~…ĺ…ôt…ômuńß ¶i *onatńßan atu sara i n…ôw jork a zazan. *onatńßan*sara*******. ńßa ¶a izawtu ku mamidaŇč ¶i *onatńßan atu sara , masasik…ôt tu ku s…ôpi tina tatusaaj, mik…ôtun par~…ĺar~…ĺid ńßaw ku s…ôpi. ujzasa ¶aajtu masasik…ôt. izaw ńß…ônaj ku zat…ôŇč i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni. , mir~…ĺijas tu ku ńß…ôni. , ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu t…ôk…ôd a uzip. *******. iga siwkaj nu ńßur~…ĺam ¶i ¶ńßaŇčnas…ôn izaw tu ku mamidaŇč, ¶i sar~…ĺa sa izaw tu ku mamidaŇč. iajaw nu *mas, mar~…ĺit…ômuńß i n…ôw jork, nama maar~…ĺa ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺima-ziku ¶. ¶i ¶ńßaŇčnas…ôn majdińß mir~…ĺiwan ku t…ôr~…ĺaj baŇčku ni sar~…ĺa. sakamu satu ¶i sar~…ĺa, anu izaw ku s…ôpi, mar~…ĺ…ôt…ômuńß a ¶a ku ńß…ôni. jadańß ku mińß ¶a, asia ¶awa tu ¶i ¶ńßaŇčnas…ôn atu ¶i sar~…ĺa. iajaw nu kasia ¶awa, kar~…ĺijuńß ku ńß…ôni. mar~…ĺijuńß tu ku tat…ôŇčaaj a mamidaŇč. sisa, mikir~…ĺim tu ku ńß…ôni. izawaj ¶a ¶aj ku mar~…ĺimanaj a ¶udad atu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu ¶akaj.
